arts.ttl: Dortmund's downward spiral: From Champions League finalists to Bundesliga strugglers
arts.sum: It's a campaign that began with a measure of optimism enveloping the club on the back of an improbable UEFA Champions League final appearance and what looked like a decent summer of transfer activity. The Leipzig game wears the look of a game that could make or break the club's aspirations of returning to the Champions League next season.

arts.ttl: Kovac gives update on Dortmund squad ahead of Augsburg clash
arts.sum: Niko Kovac has provided an update on his Borussia Dortmund squad ahead of Saturday's home game against Augsburg.
Borussia Dortmund continue to play catch-up on securing a European spot as they host Augsburg at Signal Iduna Park on Saturday. Just one place separates these two teams as Dortmund…

arts.ttl: Youssoufa Moukoko likely to return to Borussia Dortmund in the summer
arts.sum: Speaking to Ruhr Nachrichten, Nice journalist Leandra Iacono has revaled that it is likely that Youssoufa Moukoko will return to Borussia Dortmund in the summer. The 20-year-old moved to the south…

arts.ttl: Dortmund and Leverkusen named as suitors for Czech international
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen are reportedly among the clubs interested in Czech international Pavel Sulc.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Augsburg preview: Hosts look to continue getting back on track
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund carry the aim of continuing their late push for European football this weekend as they welcome Augsburg to Westfalenstadion.

arts.ttl: Moukoko fully expected to return to Dortmund
arts.sum: According to a reporter keeping a close eye on OGC Nice, there is no doubt that the French club will not be signing Borussia Dortmund loanee Youssoufa Moukoko permanently.

arts.ttl: Klopp regrets not signing Mané at Dortmund
arts.sum: Jürgen Klopp admitted that not signing Sadio Mané when he was Borussia Dortmund head coach was his biggest transfer regret.

arts.ttl: Preview: Borussia Dortmund vs. Augsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Borussia Dortmund and Augsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Kobel shares thoughts on football's latest rule change affecting goalkeepers
arts.sum: The BVB goalkeeper believes the new rule will both improve the game and speed it up.
